description_long: This is a classic blueberry muffin with a domed, golden-brown top and a slightly uneven, rustic surface. The muffin top is studded with visible dark purple blueberry spots, some of which have burst and stained the surrounding crumb. The body of the muffin is encased in a plain, lightly crinkled white paper wrapper, with the base appearing slightly more compact and dense. The muffin's surface has a matte, slightly rough texture, with a few sugar crystals visible in some areas. There is no visible frosting or decorative elements, and the muffin appears fresh and moist, typical of a bakery or café offering.
description: A golden-brown blueberry muffin with a domed top, visible blueberry spots, and a plain white paper wrapper.
description_view_0: The muffin is shown with a prominent dome, several blueberry spots on the top, and a clear view of the plain white wrapper.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a large blueberry burst on the upper left and a more rounded muffin top.
description_view_2: The muffin's top appears slightly more textured, with multiple blueberry spots clustered together.
description_view_3: The muffin is viewed from a flatter side, showing fewer blueberry spots and a smoother dome.
